subject: New Opening: Data Engineer – Public sector
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the public sector sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Data Engineer with strong experience in Scala. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Scala
  • AWS
  • Redis
  • Pub/Sub

Details:
Client: Digitalsverige
Start: ASAP
Duration: 3 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Sofia Larsson
Tech Recruiter
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 73 789 01 23
